the same Dasa, Saturn Bhukti he had an attack of
bronchitis. Mark the disposition of the 6th lord and Saturn
in Gemini, an airy sign.
In Chart No. 116 the 6th is occupied by Ketu while the
Moon is in Virgo subjected to powerful Papakarthari Yoga.
The 6th lord Sun is in the 2nd with Mercury lord of the 4th.
The 6th from the Moon is occupied by Rahu

Concerning the Sixth House 275
Chart No. 115.—Born on 19-5-1916 at 6-10 a.m.
(I.S.T.) (Lot. 22° V N., Long. 82° 4' E.)
Balance of Mercury Dasa at birth : Years 4-6-9.
Chart No. 116.—Born on 4/5-5-1895 at 4-00 a.m.
(L.M.T.) (Lot. 13° 2' N., Long. 77° 35' E.)
Balance of Sun Dasa at birth : Years 4-5-19.

276 How to Judge a Horoscope
and the 6th lord Saturn is in the 2nd from the Moon
aspected by Sun and Mercury. Therefore the liability to
attack by appendicitis is plain and unmistakable.
As we have already said above, Ketu is in the 6th
ruling abdomen. Saturn is in the 8th house.
